_comment: Snapshot writer torture fixture (Wave 4 Part B, pinned test 6.2 #2). Shaped like a Sensitivity_Labels collector output. Exercises: hostile strings (quotes, angle brackets, backslashes), unicode, a no-guid item (Name fallback), empty and single-item arrays, and a depth-canary nested to the writer's max expected nesting to prove ConvertTo-Json -Depth 16 loses nothing. Never fed to analyzers.
